case_title: DOLAND, STEVEN A. vs. MAGIC PAN INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLAND, STEVEN A. AS TO DEFENDANT MAGIC PAN INTERNATIONAL, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOLAND, STEVEN A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGIC PAN INTERNATIONAL, INC. $1,144.70 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,218.70
